json_data.title: Foundations of Educational Psychology
json_data.reason: This topic provides the theoretical underpinnings for understanding how students learn and the pedagogical strategies effective in the LA role.

json_data.title: Instructional Design Principles for Higher Education
json_data.reason: Building on practical LA experience, this topic explores the systematic process of creating effective learning experiences and materials.

json_data.title: Researching the Impact of Peer-Led Learning Models on Student Outcomes
json_data.reason: This topic delves into advanced research methodologies and educational theory to critically evaluate the effectiveness and mechanisms of programs like those LAs facilitate.
